nodes.title: static.yml
nodes.description: GitHub Actions workflow that builds the Vite project and deploys the static output to GitHub Pages. Triggers on pushes to main and manual dispatch. Defines two jobs: build (installs Node 24, runs npm install/build, uploads dist artifact) and deploy (uses actions/deploy-pages).
nodes.languageNotes: YAML syntax used for GitHub Actions workflow definition. Standard key-value structure with nested mapping for job steps and configuration.

nodes.title: build job
nodes.description: Build job that checks out code, sets up Node 24, installs dependencies with npm, runs the Vite build, and uploads the dist directory as a Pages artifact.

nodes.title: deploy job
nodes.description: Deploy job that depends on the build job and deploys the uploaded artifact to GitHub Pages using actions/deploy-pages.

edges.description: Deploy job depends on build job completion (needs: build)
